singles.title: ABOUT
singles.subtitle: Company Introduction
singles.description: Company Introduction ALCOEN is a company specializing in the development of chromatography fillers with an efficient R&D team. Over the years, we have accumulated rich experience in the research and development of nano-microspheres and provided complete soluti
singles.content:
Company Introduction

 

ALCOEN is a company specializing in the development of chromatography fillers with an efficient R&D team. Over the years, we have accumulated rich experience in the research and development of nano-microspheres and provided complete solutions for pharmaceutical factories through industrial integration, committed to reducing costs for the global pharmaceutical industry.

We have established a complete development system, providing customers with high-quality chromatography fillers and advanced chromatography technology. Our team consists of a group of experienced and skilled scientists and engineers who are committed to translating the latest scientific technology into practical applications and continuously promoting the advancement and innovation of chromatography technology.

Our product range covers various types of chromatography media, including normal phase, reverse phase, ion exchange, affinity chromatography, etc., to meet the diverse needs of different customers. Our solutions provide comprehensive support to pharmaceutical companies, bridging the gap between technology and customer usage, helping them reduce costs, improve efficiency, and create greater value. Our mission is to provide customers with high-quality products and services, and become one of the world's leading suppliers of chromatography media. We will continue to strive for excellence and innovation, and provide customers with even better products and services. The pursuit of technological perfection and innovation is our eternal driving force.

 

Sincerely

products.title: Semaglutide
products.author: Admin
products.description: 1.  Domestic policy : April   2021 , Semaglutide injection has been approved in mainland China, with the same indications as the two earliest approved indications in the US market, and has been eligible for medical insurance .
products.summary: 1.  Domestic policy : April   2021 , Semaglutide injection has been approved in mainland China, with the same indications as the two earliest approved indications in the US market, and has been eligible for medical insurance .
products.content:
1. Domestic policy: April 2021, Semaglutide injection has been approved in mainland China, with the same indications as the two earliest approved indications in the US market, and has been eligible for medical insurance.

 

2. Application field: Semaglutide has excellent performance in the field of diabetes and weight loss, with a market scale of more than 10billion US dollars. The global total usage exceeded 500 kilograms in 23 years and is expected to increase by over 20% in 24 years.

 

3. Project foundation: Due to the strong correlation of the industrial chain, our company has accumulated a large amount of experience in the production and preparation of peptide drugs, and has mastered the best domestic preparation process of Semaglutide.

 

4. Project advantage: We have a more advantageous production process, which can compress the production cost to $90/g (the market price is $1000, the average production cost is $300-400), the price advantage is obvious. 25-26 year is expected to declare oral preparations, the market demand will be enlarged by 20 to 30 times.

 

5. Project value: API, the first phase of production, can produce 20KG/ year, the second year can achieve the output of more than 40KG/ year, according to the current price estimate, the output value can reach $40million dollars per year. After the approval of the preparation factory, the annual output value of a single product will exceed $150 million dollars per year.

products.title: Tirzepatide & Linaclotide
products.author: Admin
products.content:
Tirzepatide

 

1.Tirzepatide is a diabetes treatment. It is a dual agonist of glucose-dependent insulin- stimulating polypeptide (GIP) receptor and glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor. Activating the GLP-1 receptor reduces hunger and thus diet and caloric intake, while activating the GIP receptor reduces diet and caloric intake and increases energy expenditure.

 

2.In comparison with the hypoglycemic effect of Semaglutide, tirzepatide reduced HBA1c by 2.0-2.3% on average, while semaglutide decreased by 1.9% on average. In terms of fat loss,tirzepatide resulted in an average fat loss of 17 to 25 pounds, compared with 13 pounds for Semaglutide. tirzepatide showed more superior hypoglycemic and weight loss effects than semaglutide.

 

 

 

Linaclotide

 

1.Linaclotide capsule has the effect of relieving constipation and can treat adult constipated irritable bowel syndrome. Linalotide capsule is a guanylate cyclase agonist with visceral analgesic and secretory effects.

 

2.At present, only the original research of the drug has been approved for listing in China, the competition degree of the first imitation drug of the drug in China is weak. Linalotide capsule was approved for market in early 2019, and was included in the medical insurance class B variety at the end of the following year. As a result, linalotide capsules achieve rapid dosing. In the first half of 2022, intra-hospital sales exceeded 5.7 million US dollars, an increase of 246%. At present, the domestic market of the drug is exclusive to Astrazeneca, and it is expected that the first domestic imitation drug will be approved as soon as possible.

products.title: Cetrorelix acetate & Leuprorelin
products.author: Admin
products.content:
Cetrorelix acetate

 

1.Cetrorik is A synthetic gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH) antagonist (GNRH-A) drug. The indications are for patients undergoing controlled ovarian stimulation, preventing early ovulation, and then ovulation collection and assisted reproductive technology treatment, which has been listed in 45 countries including Europe and entered China in 2010.

 

2. For many years, only the original drug Cetronic acetate for injection in the domestic market was sold, and it was not until 2018 that a small number of domestic products broke the monopoly. However, it is still in a state of under-saturation.

 

 

 

Leuprelin

 

1. Leuprelin acetate microspheres for injection, mainly composed of leuprelin acetate, are gonadotropin-releasing hormone agonists, in white or white-like particles or powder form. The drug is mainly used to treat endometriosis, uterine fibroids, breast cancer, prostate cancer, central precocious puberty and other diseases.

 

2. From 2010 to 2021, US sales of leprerelin microsphere varieties for injection have remained at about $800 million for more than a decade. It entered the Chinese market around 2000. The terminal sales of leuprelin acetate microspheres in China's public medical institutions increased from $83 million in 2013 to $600 million in 2021, with a CAGR of 24.44% in the past five years
